jobs.title: Java Swing Table Alignment Fix
jobs.description:
The values inside my JTable have suddenly started appearing out of alignment and it is throwing off the entire layout of the screen. I have already confirmed that the model is feeding the correct data, so the problem sits somewhere in the rendering or column-configuration layer. All I need is a sharp set of eyes to jump into the existing Java Swing codebase, spot the cause, and give me a concise patch (or clear instructions) that restores the expected alignment for every row, every time the table is refreshed.

You will receive:
• the relevant JFrame subclass, including the current TableModel

jobs.description:
URGENT — Email Signature + Business Cards (2-Sided) | Medical Startup | $50 | Start Immediately
Looking for a graphic designer who can start RIGHT NOW.
Deliverable 1: Email signature (PNG + HTML) — 2 hours
Deliverable 2: Business cards front + back, print-ready PDF for Staples upload — 12 hours
This is a premium medical company brand. Chrome, navy, brushed metal aesthetic. NOT flat design. Think Aston Martin meets healthcare.
Full design brief with approved reference images, exact specs, brand colors, and all content attached. Everything you need is in the brief — read it before bidding.
Budge

jobs.title: Design 7 High-Converting E-commerce Images for Premium Men's Leather Wallet
jobs.description:
We are looking for a talented and creative designer to create 7 high-quality product listing images for a premium men's leather wallet.

The goal is to design modern, clean, and high-converting images similar to top Amazon / Shopify brands that clearly highlight our product’s quality, features, and advantages over competitors.

1. Hero Image (Main Image)
Clean white or minimal background
Wallet slightly angled (premium feel)
Soft shadow or reflection
Highlight texture (leather grain)
packaging please add 

2. Show 4–6 key features with icons:
RFID Blocking
Multiple Card Slots
Cash + Coin Slots

jobs.title: CostX BoQ Preparation Small task
jobs.description:
I require a concise Bill of Quantities that covers the groundwork, formwork and concrete work for a handful of footings and their associated excavation.  All measurement must follow the ANZSS rules and the take-off has to be completed directly in CostX.  

Scope  
The drawings are ready and the package is small, limited to excavation, footing concrete, reinforcement, formwork and any incidental items that ANZSS requires to be shown. No other trades are involved.  


If you are comfortable working in CostX under ANZSS and can meet the two-day window, this should be a straightforward assignment.
